---
title: "About This Website"
---

## Portfolio Table of Contents

| # | Title |
|---|-------|
| 1 | [Methodological Trends in Psychology (2008-2024)](p01.html) |
| 2 | [Visualizing Abstracts](p02.html) |
| 3 | [Methodological Trends in Social/Personality Psychology (2017-2022)](p03.html) |
| 4 | [A DAG Structure for Social Media's Impact on Mental Health](p04.html) |
| 5 | [Drawing Beautiful DAGs With ggplot2](p05.html) |
| 6 | [Simulation for the Effects of Social Media on Mental Health (Pt 1)](p06.html) |
| 7 | [A Diff-In-Diff Event Study for the Effects of Social Media on Mental Health (Pt 2)](p07.html) |
| 8 | [Robustness Checks for the Effects of Social Media on Mental Health](p08.html) |
| 9 | [Using LLMs for Qualitative Coding](p09.html) |
| 10 | [Simulation for the Effects of Alcohol on Mental Health (RDD)](p10.html) |
